title: Freelook
description: Lunar Client-style FreeLook for Minecraft. Hold a key to freely look around without changing your walking direction or player rotation.
body:
Lunar Client-style FreeLook for Minecraft. Hold the configured key (default: V) to freely look around without changing your walking direction or player rotation. Keybind is fully customizable in Controls settings.

This mod may not work as intended as it's still in alpha, I'm trying to fix it :)
